block_00: Learn to read the Forex chart
block_01: Being one of the most popular trading instruments, Forex has its own peculiarities. Without the basic knowledge, traders are exposed to unnecessary risks. What does the term “Forex” stand for? What are base and quote currencies?
block_02: In case you already know the answers to these questions, there is a lot more to learn from this article. If not, then this material is definitely a must-read for you.
block_03: If you are still not sure about how Forex deals are executed, how to pick currencies and how to analyze the market, read on.
